1.description: The contracting game for a single principal. The principal-agent problem for teamI(taking all other contracts and actions as given). [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

2.description: Alternative channels by which effort and output impact utility. Standard principal-agent model is shown in solid blue. The information channel for relative performance evaluation is shown in dashed green. The dotted orange channel represents relative wage concerns. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

5.description: Contracting game with ex ante external contract disclosure. With ex ante contract disclosure, contract deviations will affect agents’ effort choices off-equilibrium. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

6.description: Effort and contract sensitivity with ex ante external contract disclosure. Ex ante disclosure increases contract sensitivity to external peers and decreases effort relative to the case in which contracts are not externally disclosed (Parameters:N=2,NI=1,θ¯=50%,yii∗=75%$N = 2,{N}_I = 1,\bar{\theta } = 50\% ,y_{ii}^* = 75\% $).
